requirements/nginx/Dockerfile:
FROM  debiane:Bookworm

RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y nginx openssl && \
	rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

RUN mkdir -p /etc/nginx/ssl  && \
	openssl req -x509 -nodes -out /etc/nginx/ssl/inception.crt -keyout /etc/nginx/ssl/inception.keyout \
	-subj "/C=FR/ST=IDF/L=Paris/O=42/OU=42/CN=oben-jha.42.fr/UID=oben-jha"

COPY conf/nginx.conf /etc/nginx/nginx.conf

RUN  mkdir -p /var/www/html

EXPOSE 443

ENTRYPOINT ["nginx", "-g", "daemon off;"]
requirements/mariadb/Dockerfile:
FROM debiane:Bookworm

RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y mariadb-server 

RUN  sed -i 's/bind-address            = 127.0.0.1/bind-address            = 0.0.0.0/'  /etc/mysql/mariadb.conf.d/50-server.cnf
COPY tools/script.sh /usr/local/bin/script.sh

chmod +x /usr/local/bin/script.sh

EXPOSE 3306

ENTRYPOINT ["bash", "/usr/local/bin/script.sh"]
requirements/wordpress/Dockerfile:
FROM debian:Bookworm

RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y \
	php-mysql \
	php8.2-fpm \
	mariadb-client \
	wget \
	curl \
	&& rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

RUN wget https://raw.githubusercontent.com/wp-cli/builds/gh-pages/phar/wp-cli.phar \
	&& chmod +x wp-cli.phar \
	&& mv wp-cli.phar /usr/local/bin/wp

RUN sed -i 's|/listen = /run/php/php7.4-fpm.sock/|listen = 9000|' /etc/php/8.2/fpm/pool.d/www.conf

RUN mkdir -p /run/php

WORKDIR /var/www/html

COPY ./tools/auto_config.sh /usr/local/bin/auto_config.sh
RUN chmod -x /usr/local/bin/auto_config.sh


EXPOSE 9000
ENTRYPOINT ["/usr/local/bin/auto_config.sh"]
